description: Long-term regression pack manifest. Tracks tests promoted from feature pipelines. Managed by promote-to-regression.sh — do not edit manually.

fields.name: Unique filename of the test (basename)
fields.sourceFeature: Feature ID from which the test was promoted (e.g. 0000004-tdd-regression-test-quality)
fields.filePath: Relative path to the test file within tests/regression/
